mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
